user_query: I'm planning a hiking trip to Yosemite National Park next week and I need to check the weather forecast. Can you provide me with a 16-day forecast for the park? Additionally, I want to know if there are any active weather alerts in the area. Finally, I need the current weather observation for Yosemite Valley to help me plan my activities.

TaskList.description: Fetch the 16-day weather forecast for Yosemite National Park.
Check for any active weather alerts in the Yosemite National Park area.
Retrieve the current weather observation for Yosemite Valley.
